creator: rigoletto@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 186851
Updating to 0.16.2

This patch does:

* update vdirsyncer to 0.16.2 version
* switch to DISTVERSION
* update the LICENSE to BSD3CLAUSE

The EteSync support was not added because it would require py-etesync to be ported, what would require several others python libraries to also be ported...

Thanks!
